name: python_sync_to_async_function_conversion
description: Test detection of synchronous function converted to asynchronous
old_code:
import time

def fetch_data():
    time.sleep(1)
    return "data"
new_code:
import asyncio

async def fetch_data():
    await asyncio.sleep(1)
    return "data"

expected_changes.description: Import changed from time to asyncio
Function converted from sync to async
Changed from time.sleep to asyncio.sleep with await
